blog_title: DTF vs Screen Print vs Embroidery Cost Per Piece — ₹500 T-Shirt Real Profit Breakdown for Indian Printers
caption:
Same ₹500 tee. Three printing methods. Three VERY different margins 💰

DTF: ₹35/piece but no minimums. Screen print: ₹18/piece but needs 100 pieces minimum. Embroidery: ₹65/piece but got repeat orders.

Total cost per unit changes everything. We broke down real numbers from a printer who tested all three.

Save this post before your next bulk order 👇
